intro: Rodriguezia negrensis, also known as Negrense Rodriguezia or Yellow Rodriguezia, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Rodriguezia negrensis include flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Rodriguezia negrensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of tinctures or ointments, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
